case_title: MARK HUNT VS. RICARDO COLLISON ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED JUL-06-0015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COLLISON, MICHELE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED JUL-03-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLLISON, RICARDO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,850.00 FILED BY HUNT, MARK DBA M & L CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT COLLISON, RICARDO COLLISON, MICHELE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT RICARDO COLLISON WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
